assessments.pageSubtitle: View all tests, quizzes, exams and assessments.
assessments.guideline1: Start the assessment before its scheduled window closes — once time runs out, it auto-submits with whatever has been answered.
assessments.guideline2: Stay on this tab for the full duration — leaving or refreshing may end your attempt early.
assessments.guideline3: Flag questions you want to revisit and review them before submitting.
assessments.guideline4: Each assessment can only be attempted once — there is no retake unless your teacher reopens it.
assessments.guideline5: Results appear here once your teacher releases them — an "Upcoming" or "Overdue" status does not mean your score is hidden on purpose.
assessments.ruleTimerStarts: Timer starts immediately when you begin the test.
assessments.ruleNoRetakes: No retakes allowed — you only get one attempt.
assessments.ruleAutoSubmit: Test auto-submits when the timer reaches zero.
assessments.ruleStableInternet: Ensure a stable internet connection throughout.
assessments.ruleNoCopyPaste: Copy/paste and tab switching are restricted.
assessments.ruleMonitored: All interactions are monitored and logged.
assessments.confirmReadInstructions: I have read all instructions, I understand the rules, and I am ready to begin. I confirm I will not use any unauthorized resources.

assessments.canStillAnswer: You can still go back and answer them before submitting.
assessments.onceSubmittedWarning: Once submitted, answers cannot be changed.

assessments.revisionPlanExcellent: you're performing excellently! Focus on maintaining your consistency and attempting advanced practice questions.
assessments.revisionPlanSolid: you have a solid foundation. Revisit the topics where you lost marks and practice with similar questions.
assessments.revisionPlanIntensive: we recommend intensive revision of the core concepts in this chapter. Start with your study materials, then attempt practice questions progressively.
assessments.personalizedPlan: Personalized improvement plan based on your performance

match.title: Memory Match
match.blurb: Flip tiles to pair up every question with its answer. Visual, low-pressure — no typing needed.

boss.title: Boss Battle
boss.blurb: Answer right to attack the boss, get it wrong and it hits back. Defeat it before your HP runs out!

builder.title: Formula Builder
builder.blurb: Tap scrambled pieces to reconstruct the exact answer from scratch — the gold standard for locking in formulas.

blitz.title: Blitz
blitz.blurb: 60 seconds. Tap the right answer as fast as you can. Speed & combos = big points.

type.title: Type It
type.blurb: Type the exact answer. Active recall — no options to lean on.

survival.title: Survival
survival.blurb: 3 lives, no clock, ever-rising speed. How long a streak can you hold?

match.hint: Blue tiles are questions, green tiles are answers — find the matching pair.

scholarships.pageSubtitle: Manage scholarship programs, applications, and disbursements
scholarships.autoDeductionDesc: When a scholarship is active, the discount is automatically applied to the next fee invoice. No manual adjustment needed.
scholarships.combinedDiscountPolicyDesc: If a student qualifies for more than one discount at once (e.g. a scholarship AND a sibling discount), the total is capped at this percentage of the base fee. Set this to your school's actual policy — 100% means no cap (discounts stack freely).
scholarships.emptyPrograms: No scholarship programs yet — create your first scholarship to see it grouped here.
scholarships.emptyRenewalsDue: No scholarships due for renewal in the next 60 days.
scholarships.studentPickerHelp: Selecting a real student links this scholarship for accurate fee-discount calculation. If the student isn't enrolled yet, enter their name manually below — the link can be added later by editing this record.
scholarships.toastApproved: Scholarship approved for {{name}} — invoice will be adjusted automatically.
scholarships.toastNoActiveScholarships: No active scholarships yet — create one to test auto-deduction.
scholarships.toastNoMatchLinkedRemoved: No enrolled student record matches "{{name}}" ({{grade}}) — cannot compute a real preview. The linked student record may have been removed.
scholarships.toastNoMatchLegacy: No enrolled student record matches "{{name}}" ({{grade}}) — cannot compute a real preview. This scholarship predates the student picker; edit it to link a real student, or verify the name/grade match an enrolled record.
scholarships.toastNoFeeStructure: No active fee structure found for {{grade}} — cannot compute a base fee to discount.
scholarships.toastPreviewFailed: Could not compute a real preview — see console for details.
scholarships.certPresentedTo: This certificate is proudly presented to
scholarships.certBody: in recognition of being awarded the {{type}} Scholarship, granting a {{discount}}% fee discount valued at {{currency}} {{amount}} annually.
